name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: Affordable housing for urban poor with financial assistance for building or purchasing homes.
benefits: Credit Linked Subsidy (CLSS) up to ₹2.67 Lakhs.
eligibility: Annual income < ₹18 Lakhs, No pucca house in India.

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
description: Centralized IT platform providing various scholarships for students from pre-matric to PhD.
benefits: Scholarships up to ₹50,000/year for tuition/maintenance.
eligibility: Merit-based, family income typically < ₹8 Lakhs.

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Direct income support to small and marginal farmers to supplement financial needs.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in 3 equal installments.
eligibility: Small & marginal farmers owning land up to 2 hectares.

name: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
description: Health insurance coverage for economically vulnerable families ensuring cashless healthcare.
benefits: ₹5 Lakhs health cover per family per year for hospitalization.
eligibility: Families identified via SECC 2011 data.

name: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Bank loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Composite loans between ₹10 Lakhs to ₹1 Crore.
eligibility: SC/ST/Women entrepreneurs above 18 years of age.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small deposit savings scheme for girl children for their education and marriage.
benefits: High interest (8.2%) and tax benefits under Section 80C.
eligibility: Parents/guardians of girls below 10 years of age.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme for farmers against natural calamities, pests or diseases.
benefits: Full insurance cover against crop loss with low premiums.
eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers.

name: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
description: Ensuring 'Per Drop More Crop' by providing irrigation facilities and improving water use efficiency.
benefits: Financial assistance for drip/sprinkler irrigation systems.
eligibility: Farmers owning land with a focus on rain-fed areas.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Providing soil health cards to farmers with recommendations on nutrients for better yield.
benefits: Free soil testing and customized fertilizer recommendations.
eligibility: All farmers across the country.

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
description: Support and promotion of organic farming through cluster approach.
benefits: Financial support of ₹50,000 per hectare for 3 years.
eligibility: Groups of farmers (clusters) moving to organic practices.

name: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
description: Online trading platform for agricultural commodities ensuring better price discovery.
benefits: Access to a national market for crops, reducing middleman margins.
eligibility: Farmers and farmers' organizations (FPOs).

name: PM Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
description: Providing quality generic medicines at affordable prices through dedicated outlets.
benefits: Medicines available at 50% to 90% cheaper than branded markets.
eligibility: Open to all citizens regardless of income.

name: Mission Indradhanush
description: Full immunization coverage for all children and pregnant women.
benefits: Free vaccination against 12 life-threatening diseases.
eligibility: Children under 2 years and all pregnant women.

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
description: Maternity benefit program providing cash incentive for the first/second child.
benefits: Cash incentive of ₹5,000 for the first child and ₹6,000 for the second girl child.
eligibility: Pregnant and lactating mothers for the first/second live birth.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Campaign aimed at generating awareness and improving the efficiency of welfare services for girls.
benefits: Focused education support and protection of the girl child.
eligibility: Applicable across all districts with low sex ratios.

name: PM Research Fellowship (PMRF)
description: Attracting best talent into research in science and technology for PhD programs.
benefits: Fellowships from ₹70,000 to ₹80,000 per month.
eligibility: B.Tech/M.Tech/M.Sc students from IITs/NITs/IISERs with high GPA.

name: INSPIRE Scholarship
description: Scholarship for Higher Education (SHE) to attract students to basic sciences.
benefits: ₹80,000 per year for 5 years.
eligibility: Top 1% in Class 12th board exams pursuing B.Sc/M.Sc.

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: Providing clean cooking fuel (LPG) to women members of BPL households.
benefits: Free LPG connection and first refilled cylinder.
eligibility: Women from BPL/SC/ST/EBC households.

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to banking/savings services.
benefits: Zero balance account, accidental insurance of ₹2 Lakhs, RuPay card.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen above 10 years of age.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Social security scheme for the unorganized sector providing fixed pension.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after reaching age 60.
eligibility: Subscribers between 18 to 40 years of age.

name: PM Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
description: Pension scheme for unorganized workers like street vendors, rickshaw pullers, etc.
benefits: Assured monthly pension of ₹3,000 after age 60.
eligibility: Unorganized workers with monthly income < ₹15,000, age 18-40.

name: PM SVANidhi
description: Special micro-credit facility for street vendors to resume their livelihood.
benefits: Working capital loan up to ₹10,000, ₹20,000 and ₹50,000 in cycles.
eligibility: Street vendors who were vending on or before March 24, 2020.

name: Pragati Scholarship for Girls
description: Providing advancement of girls pursuing technical education.
benefits: ₹50,000 per year for tuition and other expenses.
eligibility: Girl students admitted to 1st year diploma/degree programs in AICTE institutes.

name: Post Matric Scholarship SC/ST
description: Scholarships to help SC and ST students pursue post-secondary education.
benefits: Full tuition fee coverage and maintenance allowance.
eligibility: SC/ST students with family income < ₹2.5 Lakhs per year.

name: Saksham Scholarship
description: Scholarships for specially-abled students for pursuing technical education.
benefits: ₹50,000 per year for education Support.
eligibility: Students with disability > 40% pursuing technical courses.

name: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana (KVPY)
description: Fellowships to students interested in research careers in Basic Sciences.
benefits: Monthly stipend and annual contingency grant.
eligibility: Students of Class 11th to 1st year graduation in science.

name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
description: Supporting traditional artisans and craftspeople through skill and credit support.
benefits: Stipend of ₹500/day during training, loan up to ₹3 Lakhs at 5%.
eligibility: Artisans engaged in 18 traditional trades like goldsmith, blacksmith, etc.

name: Mahila Shakti Kendra
description: Empowering rural women through community participation and information sharing.
benefits: Support services, skill development, and health information.
eligibility: Rural women across socio-economic backgrounds.

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
description: Providing free food grains to the poor and needy families.
benefits: 5kg of food grain per person per month for free.
eligibility: NFSA beneficiaries (Antyodaya Anna Yojana & PHH).

name: One Stop Centre (OSC)
description: Support for women affected by violence, in private and public spaces.
benefits: Medical, legal, psychological, and police help under one roof.
eligibility: All women, including girls below 18 years of age.

name: Mahila E-Haat
description: Direct online marketing platform for women entrepreneurs.
benefits: Free online display of products for better market reach.
eligibility: Women entrepreneurs, SHGs, and NGOs.

name: PM Kusum Scheme
description: Promotion of solar energy among farmers for irrigation.
benefits: 60% subsidy for installation of solar pumps.
eligibility: Individual farmers, FPOs, and cooperatives.

name: Pashu Kisan Credit Card
description: Financial assistance to livestock farmers for their working capital needs.
benefits: Low-interest loans for animal husbandry and dairying.
eligibility: Dairy farmers, poultry and fish farmers.

name: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana
description: Focused development of the fisheries sector through financial support.
benefits: Assistance for boat modernization, insurance, and cold chains.
eligibility: Fishers, fish farmers, and SHGs in the fisheries sector.

name: Working Women Hostel
description: Safe and affordable accommodation for working women.
benefits: Heavily subsidized hostel and daycare facilities for children.
eligibility: Working women whose income is below the prescribed limit.

name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana (RSBY)
description: Health insurance for unorganized sector workers.
benefits: Smart card-based cashless hospitalization for ₹30,000/year.
eligibility: BPL workers in the unorganized sector.

name: Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS)
description: Providing food, preschool education, and primary healthcare to children and mothers.
benefits: Nutritional supplements and regular health checkups at Anganwadis.
eligibility: Children under 6, pregnant and lactating women.

name: PM Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission
description: Strengthening peripheral health systems and surveillance.
benefits: Better critical care blocks and lab diagnostic services.
eligibility: Improves healthcare access for all citizens.

name: PM Surakshat Matritva Abhiyan
description: Providing quality antenatal care to every pregnant woman.
benefits: Free comprehensive health checkups on the 9th of every month.
eligibility: All pregnant women in their 2nd or 3rd trimesters.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Gramin)
description: Provide a degree of housing support for the rural homeless.
benefits: Assistance of ₹1.2 Lakhs to ₹1.3 Lakhs for house construction.
eligibility: Rural households listed as homeless via SECC list.

name: Mid-Day Meal Scheme
description: Providing hot cooked meals to children in government schools.
benefits: Nutritional intake of 450 calories and 12g protein per day.
eligibility: All children studying in classes I-VIII in government schools.
